ops.body: Rollout complete. Soak verdicts (both lanes exercised the full production path, both correctly rejected — registry untouched): gate "rejected (pr_auc 0.9357 <= incumbent 0.9361)"; watcher trained on Tinker under the $15 cap, scored server-side, "rejected (coverage losses 22 > wins 0)" despite an AUC beat (0.8645 vs 0.8103, budget held) — mirrors E12 M1-vs-v001. Post-rollout fix: the reinstalled watch daemon crash-looped (bare default prefix lacks gate/mlx extras); restored with uvx --from 'cc-steer[gate,mlx]' and the watch_prefix rewrite ships as v0.12.1. Lab fully retired same day (see note dc913779). Weekly agent live for Sunday 2026-07-19 04:00.
